title: Desktop
drDigitalIntro: Now let's understand everything you see on your screen. First, the desktop: this is the main screen you see when you turn on your computer. It's the starting point where you keep your folders and open your apps.
drDigitalSuccess: That's your desktop — home base for everything you do!
drDigitalHint: Take a look around the playground desktop on the right, then click Continue whenever you're ready.
